articles.title: SEC DELAYS SOLANA AND DOGECOIN ETF PROPOSALS
articles.summary: The SEC has delayed its decision on in-kind redemptions for BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF and is soliciting public comments on amendments to its creation and redemption process. Previously, the agency had preferred a cash-only model requiring the immediate sale of bitcoin upon redemption. Concurrently, the SEC postponed proposals for the Grayscale Litecoin and Solana Trusts and opened comment periods for the 21Shares Dogecoin ETF.

articles.title: NYC MAYOR ERIC ADAMS WANTS LONG-TERM VALUE WITH CRYPTO, NOT TO CHASE 'MEMES'
articles.summary: Mayor Eric Adams announced a focus on sustainable, long-term value from crypto and blockchain for New Yorkers rather than chasing fleeting memes and trends. He and city CTO Matt Fraser will host NYC's inaugural crypto summit on May 20 to drive industry collaboration and growth. Fraser emphasized blockchain's potential to democratize access to public records like birth and death certificates.

articles.title: SAFE + TOKEN WARRANT LAUNCH
articles.summary: MetaLeX now supports SAFE plus token warrants fundraising directly onchain, which lets founders raise equity with optional token upside, a method favored by VCs like a16z. Investors receive NFT-based certified securities with a tradeability toggle, enabling secure, composable deal execution without Docusign or off-chain fund wrangling.

articles.title: COLUMN LAUNCHES REAL-TIME PAYMENTS VIA FEDNOW AND RTP NETWORKS
articles.summary: Column has rolled out real-time payments across both the Federal Reserve's FedNow Service and The Clearing House's RTP network, enabling 24/7/365 instant transfers that settle in seconds. These rails support high-value, final, and irrevocable transactions cheaper than wires and faster than ACH, accessible through the same account and routing numbers. With over 1,600 U.S. banks now supporting these rails, Column reports it is already the largest real-time payments transactor in the country.

articles.title: HOW TO BENCHMARK YOUR PORTFOLIO
articles.summary: Crypto investors routinely deceive themselves by rounding returns, ignoring fees, and molding data to feel successful, making thorough record-keeping and predefined KPIs essential. Measuring performance against proper benchmarks like BTC and SPY and risk-adjusted metrics like the Sharpe ratio is vital to reveal actual performance. Investors can avoid emotional biases by setting honest risk premiums, factoring in probabilities of various losses, and separating portfolio logs from net-worth tracking.

articles.title: PRINCIPLES OF EIP STEWARDSHIP
articles.summary: 13 months of EIP 5792 development led to five principles: ship prototypes early, persist through reviews, engage stakeholders, cultivate champions, and make decisive progress. For 5792 specifically, showcasing early demos of batch and sponsored RPC methods secured support from MetaMask, Ambire, and first-party viem/wagmi libraries within weeks. Iterative stakeholder feedback (e.g., adding EOA support) and champion advocacy (e.g., jxom's viem/wagmi integration) amplified adoption.

articles.title: PROXY402 ADDS PREPAID TOP-UPS FOR API MONETIZATION
articles.summary: Proxy402 now supports top-up plans alongside pay-per-request pricing. Publishers can define prepaid tiers where a single payment issues reusable API credentials (each call deducts a credit, no reauth or repay needed).

articles.title: YUGA LABS SELLS CRYPTOPUNKS IP
articles.summary: CryptoPunks has been acquired by the Infinite Node Foundation, a nonprofit focused on preserving digital art. This move places the collection within a mission-driven endowment, aiming to ensure its longevity, foster community, and reframe its cultural impact through exhibitions and education.

articles.title: DELL TO DISMISS SHAREHOLDER BITCOIN PROPOSAL
articles.summary: Dell has received permission from the SEC to drop the shareholder-proposed vote on adding Bitcoin to the company's balance sheet.

articles.title: JPMORGAN COMPLETES FIRST PUBLIC TOKENIZED TREASURY TRADE
articles.summary: JPMorgan announced its first public tokenized treasury chain on the Ondo blockchain, using Chainlink as its cross-chain settlement engine.

articles.title: UNISWAP REACHED $3T ALL-TIME VOLUME
articles.summary: Uniswap has become the first DEX to achieve $3 trillion in all-time trading volume.

articles.title: POLYMARKET'S NEW MARKET CREATION HITS ALL-TIME HIGH IN APRIL AS VOLUME STABILIZES
articles.summary: Polymarket saw a record number of new markets created in April, even as overall trading volume stabilized.
